mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders) as "totalOrders", (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE "stateId" IN ('DELIVERED', 'SHIPPED', 'CONFIRMED')) as "activeOrders", (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total_amount), 0) FROM orders WHERE "stateId" NOT IN ('CANCELLED', 'FAILED')) as "totalRevenue", (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id) FROM orders) as "totalCustomers", (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM products WHERE "stateId" = 'PUBLISHED') as "publishedProducts", (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM products WHERE "stateId" = 'UNDER_REVIEW') as "pendingReviewProducts", (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM supplier WHERE "stateId" = 'ACTIVE') as "activeSuppliers", (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM support_tickets WHERE state_id NOT IN ('CLOSED', 'RESOLVED')) as "openTickets"
SELECT "stateId" as "state", COUNT(*) as "count" FROM orders GROUP BY "stateId" ORDER BY "count" DESC

SELECT o.id as "orderId", o."stateId" as "orderState", o.total_amount as "totalAmount", o.currency as "currency", o.created_time as "createdTime", o.item_count as "itemCount", o.customer_id as "customerId" FROM orders o ORDER BY o.created_time DESC ${pagination}

SELECT count(*) FROM inventory_item inv JOIN product_variants pv ON inv.variant_id = pv.id JOIN products p ON pv.product_id = p.id WHERE inv.available_quantity <= inv.low_stock_threshold AND p."stateId" = 'PUBLISHED'

SELECT inv.variant_id as "variantId", pv.sku as "sku", p.id as "productId", p.name as "productName", inv.available_quantity as "availableQuantity", inv.low_stock_threshold as "threshold", inv.reserved_quantity as "reservedQuantity" FROM inventory_item inv JOIN product_variants pv ON inv.variant_id = pv.id JOIN products p ON pv.product_id = p.id WHERE inv.available_quantity <= inv.low_stock_threshold AND p."stateId" = 'PUBLISHED' ORDER BY inv.available_quantity ASC ${pagination}

SELECT count(DISTINCT p.id) FROM products p JOIN product_variants pv ON pv.product_id = p.id LEFT JOIN inventory_item inv ON inv.variant_id = pv.id WHERE p."stateId" = 'PUBLISHED' AND (inv.available_quantity IS NULL OR inv.available_quantity = 0)

SELECT p.id as "productId", p.name as "productName", pv.id as "variantId", pv.sku as "sku" FROM products p JOIN product_variants pv ON pv.product_id = p.id LEFT JOIN inventory_item inv ON inv.variant_id = pv.id WHERE p."stateId" = 'PUBLISHED' AND (inv.available_quantity IS NULL OR inv.available_quantity = 0) ${orderby} ${pagination}
SELECT count(DISTINCT s.id) FROM supplier s WHERE s."stateId" = 'ACTIVE'

SELECT s.id as "supplierId", s.name as "businessName", s."stateId" as "supplierState", COUNT(DISTINCT o_offer.id) as "activeOffers", COUNT(DISTINCT ord.id) as "totalOrders", COALESCE(SUM(ord.total_amount), 0) as "totalRevenue" FROM supplier s LEFT JOIN offers o_offer ON o_offer.supplier_id = s.id AND o_offer."stateId" = 'ACTIVE' LEFT JOIN order_items oi ON oi.supplier_id = s.id LEFT JOIN orders ord ON oi.order_id = ord.id AND ord."stateId" NOT IN ('CANCELLED', 'FAILED') WHERE s."stateId" = 'ACTIVE' GROUP BY s.id, s.name, s."stateId" ${orderby} ${pagination}
SELECT "stateId" as "state", COUNT(*) as "count" FROM returnrequest GROUP BY "stateId" ORDER BY "count" DESC
SELECT count(*) FROM support_tickets WHERE state_id NOT IN ('CLOSED', 'RESOLVED')

SELECT t.id as "ticketId", t.state_id as "ticketState", t.subject as "subject", t.priority as "priority", t.customer_id as "customerId", t.order_id as "orderId", t.created_at as "createdTime", t.assigned_agent_id as "assignedTo" FROM support_tickets t WHERE t.state_id NOT IN ('CLOSED', 'RESOLVED') ORDER BY CASE t.priority WHEN 'CRITICAL' THEN 1 WHEN 'HIGH' THEN 2 WHEN 'MEDIUM' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END, t.created_at ASC ${pagination}
